ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Unique code identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Continent or region the country belongs to */,
  "gdp" REAL /* The country's GDP */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The country's population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy source */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Broad categorization of energy source */,
  "emission_factor" REAL /* Greenhouse gas emission factor per unit of energy produced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_consumption" (
  "consumption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy consumption entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Reference to the country */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the energy source */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the data corresponds to */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* The quarter of the year */,
  "consumption_value" REAL /* Value of energy consumption */,
  "consumption_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for consumption */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* More specific type of energy source */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional notes about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consumption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_consumption_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES energy_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "data_range" TEXT /* The range of data the report covers */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Specific resource accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The user's IP address at the time of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
